title: Spanish text corpus for NLP/linguistics research
author: Héctor Cadavid
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Spanish text-corpus extracted from Wikipedia, using the platform described on  Cadavid Rengifo, Héctor Fabio, and Jonatan Gómez Perdomo. "Web text corpus extraction system for linguistic tasks." Ingeniería e Investigación 29.3 (2009): 54-60, and the related master thesis  available on ResearchGate .  

 rawdata.dat: raw outcome of the extraction process from Wikipedia. 

 sentences.txt: sentences extracted from the raw data after cleaning/filtering.
steps_raw:
Spanish text-corpus extracted from Wikipedia, using the platform described on  Cadavid Rengifo, Héctor Fabio, and Jonatan Gómez Perdomo. keywords: text corpus, web corpus, web as a corpus
